hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: White Slash damage is upgraded to Ultra-White Slash damage.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra-White Slash: This skill ignores the damage reduction effect of the target, increases the break rate 20%, and causes additional damage equal to your initial attack power 400%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *White Slash: This skill ignores the damage reduction effect of the target 50%, increases the break rate 20%, and causes additional damage equal to its own initial attack power 400%
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-White Slash: This skill ignores the damage reduction effect of the target, increases the break rate 20%, and causes additional damage equal to your initial attack power 400%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1102_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: When you use an active skill, you will randomly remove 1 debuffs on your team, and according to the level of the active skill you use this time, immediately make other CCG characters with the highest initial attack power on your team release active skills of the same level on your active skill target, and increase the damage caused by this active skill 10%
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When you use an active skill, you will randomly remove 1 debuffs on your team, and according to the level of the active skill you use this time, immediately make other CCG characters with the highest initial attack power on your team release active skills of the same level on your active skill target, and increase the damage caused by this active skill 10%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1102_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: While you are on the field, allied CCG characters gain the following effects: Basic stats increase by 24%; when taking damage, Max HP increases by 10% for 1 turn, stacking up to 4 times; when dealing damage, the target's ATK decreases by 4% for 1 turn, stacking up to 4 times; when using active skills of Lv.2 or above, DMG dealt increases by 15% and PEN Rate increases by 10%
skills.max_desc_short_translated: While you are on the field, allied CCG characters gain the following effects: Basic stats increase by 24%; when taking damage, Max HP increases by 10% for 1 turn, stacking up to 4 times; when dealing damage, the target's ATK decreases by 4% for 1 turn, stacking up to 4 times; when using active skills of Lv.2 or above, DMG dealt increases by 15% and PEN Rate increases by 10%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1102_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: When our turn starts, we immediately consume all the sure-kill skills and sure-kill skill cards, increase our skill level, and obtain 1 #Entry_1#, which can only be stacked 3 times. If our health value is not less than 80%, we will additionally increase the skill level of ourselves and our character with the highest initial attack power.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When our turn starts, we immediately consume all the sure-kill skills and sure-kill skill cards, increase our skill level, and obtain 1 #Entry_1#, which can only be stacked 3 times. If our health value is not less than 80%, we will additionally increase the skill level of ourselves and our character with the highest initial attack power.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Flash: All ability values ​​are increased by 4%, all skill damage received by all allies is reduced by 12%, and additional damage received by all allies is reduced by 18%
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Flash: All ability values ​​are increased by 4%, all skill damage received by all allies is reduced by 12%, and additional damage received by all allies is reduced by 18%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases damage dealt by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases damage dealt by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1102_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: When our turn starts, we immediately consume all the sure-kill skills and sure-kill skill cards, increase our skill level, and obtain 1 pieces of #Entry_1#, which can only be superimposed 3 times. If your health is not enough Lower than 80%, the skill level of yourself and our character with the highest initial attack power will be increased. When our character's health value is lower than 60% for the first time, you will immediately gain 1 pieces of #Entry_1#
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When our turn starts, we immediately consume all the sure-kill skills and sure-kill skill cards, increase our skill level, and obtain 1 pieces of #Entry_1#, which can only be superimposed 3 times. If your health is not enough Lower than 80%, the skill level of yourself and our character with the highest initial attack power will be increased. When our character's health value is lower than 60% for the first time, you will immediately gain 1 pieces of #Entry_1#
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Flash: All ability values ​​are increased by 4%, all skill damage received by all allies is reduced by 12%, and additional damage received by all allies is reduced by 18%
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Flash: All ability values ​​are increased by 4%, all skill damage received by all allies is reduced by 12%, and additional damage received by all allies is reduced by 18%

skills.name: tid#SkillName_weak_1
skills.desc_short_translated: When inflicting Weak, grant oneself 10% increased ATK for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When inflicting Weak, grant oneself 10% increased ATK for 1 turn.

skills.desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, gain a shield equal to 5% of your MAX HP for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, gain a shield equal to 5% of your MAX HP for 1 turn.

skills.desc_short_translated: Your CCG characters gain +4% Crit Rate and +6% Crit Damage.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_Talent_Common
skills.desc_short_translated: Increases ATK by 6% when HP is above 50%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_Talent_Common

skills.max_desc_short_translated: After you use an active skill, increase the damage of your next active skill by 6% (max 3 stacks).
